examples: Did you know his real name is Fifi Millicent?
Jane trades gazes with Fifi, one of her original study subjects.
She had three children with Bob Geldof - Fifi Trixibelle, 17, Peaches Honeyblossom, 10, and Pixie, seven.
Back at her house in Dublin, Ohio, Fifi acts more like a pet than a prize winner with 70 best-in-show ribbons.
